mapper.insert: insert into ai_conversation_message(conversation_id, user_id, role, content, token_usage, status, deleted, created_at, updated_at) values(#{conversationId}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{tokenUsage}, #{status}, #{deleted}, now(), now())
mapper.select: select m.* from ai_conversation_message m inner join ai_conversation c on c.id = m.conversation_id where m.conversation_id = #{conversationId} and c.user_id = #{userId} and c.deleted = 0 and m.deleted = 0 order by m.id asc

select m.* from ai_conversation_message m inner join ai_conversation c on c.id = m.conversation_id where m.conversation_id = #{conversationId} and c.user_id = #{userId} and c.deleted = 0 and m.deleted = 0 order by m.id desc limit #{limit}
